calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Sep-10-2018 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-10-2018 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Eric R. Fleming. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6048. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Julia M. Adams, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Hotel Essex, L.P.
Ashley Monton, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Chabrika Lewis.

Plaintiff Hotel Essex, L.P.'s complaint was filed on August 7, 2018.
Defendant Chabrika Lewis' answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed on August 10, 2018.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was served on August 23, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, September 10, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Hotel Essex, L.P., and against defendant Chabrika Lewis, as follows:

Holdover Damages - $564.20.
Costs - $365.00.

Total - $929.20.

Furthermore, plaintiff Hotel Essex, L.P. is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 684 Ellis Street, #503, San Francisco, CA 94109.

The rental agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-05-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Hotel Essex, L.P. is present. Represented by.
Attorney Julia Adams for the plaintiff.
Defendant Chabrika Lewis is present.
Attorney Taylor Popichel Belew appearing for defendant in limited scope.

***3:00pm Ms. Adams and Ms. Belew report that the Defendant had not been seen since 2:00pm***

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of SEP-10-2018 remains on calendar. (501)
